expectations.text: Uses model_dump(exclude_unset=True) to get only sent fields
expectations.evidence: Uses manual iteration over model_fields_set (lines 66-75) instead of model_dump(exclude_unset=True). Functionally similar but not the idiomatic v2 pattern.

expectations.text: Has a separate update/patch model where fields are optional
expectations.evidence: UserProfilePatch on line 33 with all fields as T | None = None

expectations.text: Does NOT use exclude_none=True as the PATCH mechanism (exclude_unset is correct)
expectations.evidence: Uses model_fields_set, not exclude_none. Correct mechanism.

expectations.text: Uses model_validate or proper v2 methods, not v1 patterns
